flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kentucky Wesleyan College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.7k → $34.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kentucky Wesleyan College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).
